text: Make content engine usable: journal → Instagram workflow

status.comment: Blocked by API credentials and hosting setup - see aims 3a7b2519, 0f3eea29, 602128b3

description:
Make the content engine workflow usable end-to-end: journal entries → Instagram posts.

**Currently blocked by:**
- Missing API credentials (aim 3a7b2519)
- Missing public image hosting setup (aim 0f3eea29)
- Gemini API quota exhaustion (aim 602128b3)

**When unblocked:** Can implement the workflow automation connecting journal writing to social posting.
